prompt: A journey looking down at the Flame Towers. Baku, the capital of Azerbaijan. A flock slowly crosses over the sea breeze. A single white goose mixed in the flock.
promptEn: A journey looking down at the Flame Towers. Baku, the capital of Azerbaijan. A flock slowly crosses over the sea breeze. A single white goose mixed in the flock.
promptZh: 俯瞰 火焰塔 的旅程。 阿塞拜疆首都巴库。 一 群飞鸟 缓缓掠过海风。 其中混入了一只 白鹅。
